headline: How PNL grew organic clicks 266% in 6 months by publishing 30 AI-optimized blog posts monthly
result: PNL increased monthly organic clicks from 433 to 1,150 (+266%) and ranking keywords from 913 to 3,708 (+406%) within six months, with 2,158 clicks directly attributed to WP SEO AI content.
summary: PNL is a B2B foundation engineering specialist offering screw pile solutions as an eco-friendly alternative to traditional concrete foundations. The company faced stagnant organic traffic despite quality products and technical expertise, lacking the internal SEO capacity to capture high-intent B2B traffic during the awareness phase of the buyer's journey. By partnering with WP SEO AI to publish 30 targeted blog posts monthly, PNL achieved a 266% increase in organic clicks and positioned itself as a topical authority—with content now cited by Google AI Overview and ChatGPT.
objections: B2B sector, nobody searches for our services
Our sector is too technical or complex for AI content
Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO
pdfFile: Traffic drop panic - PNL - Success case.pdf

headline: From no SEO strategy to 4,389 monthly clicks in 6 months
result: Organic traffic grew from around 200 to 4,389 monthly clicks in just six months, with 94% of March traffic generated by WP SEO AI and traffic worth €30,880.

headline: Industrial equipment company grows from zero blog output to 480 monthly clicks across 4 websites
result: Imperial Valve grew from 1 to 328 monthly SEO AI clicks in just over a year, with total organic traffic increasing from 179 to 480 monthly clicks across all four DGF Group websites. In the latest month, WP SEO AI content accounted for 68.3% of all organic clicks.
summary: DGF Group BV operates four specialized industrial webshops including Imperial Valve, manufacturing high-pressure valves, manifolds, and instrumentation solutions for the oil, gas, and energy industries. With a small team managing multiple technical brands, they had zero blog output and limited online visibility despite knowing content marketing would drive B2B inquiries. WP SEO AI implemented a multilingual content strategy across all four websites, automatically publishing technical content about gas meters, control valves, and turnkey solutions, resulting in 273% traffic growth and increased international inquiries.

headline: Healthcare training company achieves 172% organic growth in 10 months
result: Organic clicks grew from 149 to 405 monthly clicks (+171.8%) in 10 months, with WP SEO AI content generating 54% of organic traffic and €2,750 worth of traffic value.
summary: Facet Trainingen provides specialized training for healthcare and special education professionals, focusing on aggression prevention and challenging behavior management. The owner-led company needed to grow beyond its existing network and attract new clients online while maintaining current relationships, but lacked the time and SEO capacity as a small operation with limited resources. WP SEO AI created a focused content strategy around aggression prevention and challenging behavior, delivering 130 targeted posts that helped them achieve #1 rankings for aggression prevention and gain visibility in Google AI Overviews.

headline: Motorcycle suspension specialist grows from 893 to 3,743 monthly clicks in 6 months
result: Monthly organic clicks increased from 893 to 3,743 (+319%) in 6 months, with WP SEO AI generating 64% of April traffic worth €3,073. Keyword visibility expanded from 1,478 to 22,059 keywords, with 15,701 ranking in top 3 positions.
summary: TFX Suspension manufactures custom motorcycle suspension systems for adventure bikes, motorcycles, ATVs and quads, founded by motorcycle enthusiasts Hans-Dieter and Alex. The company had virtually no SEO presence, making them unreachable to new customers who didn't already know the brand. WP SEO AI implemented a targeted content strategy starting with broad motorcycle maintenance content to build awareness, then narrowing focus to suspension-specific advice and model-specific content, publishing 50 blogs per month with strong conversion elements.
objections: Niche market, too specific for online marketing
Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO

headline: From AI-Curiosity to 67% Organic Growth: How Toonen Reizen Dominated Group Transportation Search in 7 Months
result: Organic monthly clicks grew from 870 to 1,453 (+67%) in 7 months, with 1,846 total SEO AI-driven clicks, a +385% increase in top-10 keyword rankings (2,390 new keywords captured), and 8 qualified leads generated in just 3 months post-optimization.
summary: Toonen Reizen is a century-old Dutch coach rental and travel company based in the Arnhem-Nijmegen region, offering group transportation for bus holidays, festivals, school trips, day trips, and multi-day tours across the Netherlands. Despite 100 years of experience, they lacked visibility in both local (Arnhem, Gelderland, Nijmegen) and national search results for touringcar rentals, with no clear path to proving AI-driven SEO could deliver real business impact. WP SEO AI implemented a dual-focus content strategy publishing 20 AI-powered blogs per month targeting high-intent keywords, resulting in 67% organic click growth, 385% more top-10 rankings, 8 direct lead conversions in 3 months, and citations in both Google AI Overviews and ChatGPT responses.
objections: We already do Google Ads, why also SEO

headline: From limited SEO capacity to +200% organic clicks in 6 months for a specialist B2B leasing company
result: Organic clicks grew from 670 to 2,031 per month (+200%) in six months, with WP SEO AI content generating 63.5% of all organic traffic and accumulating over 5,052 SEO AI clicks and 2.2 million impressions total.
summary: Maas-De Koning Lease is a Dutch B2B leasing company offering full operational lease, shortlease, electric vehicle leasing, and fleet management solutions for businesses, ZZP-ers and fleet managers. With a lean internal team focused on daily operations, they struggled to scale SEO in a competitive market where reaching business decision-makers through organic search was resource-intensive. WP SEO AI implemented a phased content strategy targeting high-intent commercial leasing, tax, and EV fleet topics — managing research, writing, optimisation and publishing end-to-end — resulting in a 200% increase in organic clicks, a 55% AI visibility score, and citations in Google AI Overviews and ChatGPT within six months.

headline: Dutch physiotherapy clinic hits +600% organic growth in 5 months with AI-driven content strategy
result: Organic clicks grew from 270 to 1,619 per month (+526%), top 1–3 Google rankings surged from 667 to 4,164 (+624%), and 80.2% of all clicks are now generated by WP SEO AI–created content — all within 5 months.
summary: Kruijdenberg is a Dutch physiotherapy and fitness centre based in Alphen aan den Rijn with 24+ years of experience, offering specialist care in sports injuries, rehabilitation, manual therapy, and ACL recovery. With no structured content plan, limited internal capacity, and no certainty about how AI search would evolve, founder Kasper Kruijdenberg wanted to build long-term topical authority — particularly around movement, injuries, and recovery — without chasing short-term commercial goals. WP SEO AI published ~120 SEO/GEO-optimized blogs over 5 months targeting high-intent, long-tail queries across two topic clusters (returning to fitness and sports-related pain), resulting in +1,315 additional monthly clicks, strong visibility in Google AI Overviews, and frequent mentions in ChatGPT responses.
objections: Our sector is too technical or complex for AI content
Trust-sensitive sector where mistakes are not allowed
We already do Google Ads, why also SEO

headline: Efficiency gap — strong domain but no time for content at scale
result: 240 AI-optimized articles published in 9 months. +10,641 AI-attributed clicks, 1.07M impressions, traffic worth €8,769. Content cited in ChatGPT and Google AI Overviews.
summary: ebikes.de is a German e-bike specialty portal with strong domain authority but limited content production capacity due to a small team juggling research, writing, publishing, and optimization. WP SEO AI scaled content production across e-bike maintenance, battery care, motor longevity, and buying guides, publishing 240 AI-optimized articles over 9 months. AI-attributed content now drives nearly 20% of total site clicks with citations in Google AI Overviews and ChatGPT.
objections: It takes too long before you see results
We are too small for this kind of approach
